title: NJDB (Appellant) v JEG and another (Respondents) (Scotland)

metadata.title: NJDB (Appellant) v JEG and another (Respondents) (Scotland)
metadata.summary: 1. This appeal concerns a child, S, who was born on 1 April 2000.
extracts: 1. This appeal concerns a child, S, who was born on 1 April 2000. His father is the appellant, and his mother is the first respondent. The second respondent is a solicitor who was appointed as curator ad litem to S in respect of these proceedings. The issue between the parties is whether the appellant should have contact with S.

2. The appellant and the first respondent began a relationship in 1997. It ended a few months after S’s birth. The first respondent subsequently married BG. She has a daughter, Z, by a prior relationship. She also has a son, A, by her marriage to BG.
